results.rendered_html: jenya (von jan) adj. edel von Abkunft, γενναῖος: janiṣṭa hi jenyo agre ahnām  ṚV. 5,1,5 . śiśuṃ navaṃ jajñānaṃ jenyaṃ vipaścitam 9,86,36 . 10,4,3 . viśpati 1,128,7 . vṛṣan 2,18,2 . 1,140,2 . vājin 130,6 . madhu svādma duduhe jenyā gauḥ 3,31,11 . yoṣāvṛṇīta jenyā yuvāṃ patī 1,119,5 . 71,4 . 146,5 . 10,61,24 . Viell. ächt, wahr in der Verbindung mit vasuḥ prayakṣaṃ jenyaṃ vasu  ṚV. 2,5,1 . te hinvire aruṇaṃ jenyaṃ vasvekaṃ putraṃ tisṝṇām 8,90,6 . Vgl. den folg. Art.
